title: Scenario Design Sub-Phase
description: Sub-phase 001 of the Search Intelligence Stress-Test Playbook. Ships the design fixture: 9 scenarios (3 features × 3 prompt types), 5-dim scoring rubric (correctness, tool selection, latency, token efficiency, hallucination), per-CLI dispatch matrix (cli-codex, cli-copilot, cli-opencode), output schema, and scoring methodology. Five scenarios cross-reference known defects from sibling packet 005-memory-search-runtime-bugs.
